APIErrorResponse.description:
APIErrorResponse is the top-level envelope wrapping a ResponseError.
All API error responses use this shape: { "error": { ... } }.

error.description: The error object containing details about what went wrong.

name.description: Human-readable name for the API key.

Account.description: Account with optional branding and portal sub-resources.

AccountStatus.description: AccountStatus is an account status lookup value.

AccountUser.description: Account user with profile, role, and department.

last_used_at.description: When the user last used this account.

created_at.description: When the account user was created.

updated_at.description: When the account user was last updated.

Actor.description: Reference to an actor (user, API key, or agent).

handle.description: Human-readable handle (email for users, redacted value for API keys, slug for agents).

phone.description: Phone number associated with the address.

email.description: Email address associated with the address.

is_drop_ship.description: Whether the address is a drop ship location.

address_line_1.description: First line of the street address.

address_line_2.description: Second line of the street address.

phone.description: Phone number associated with the address.

email.description: Email address associated with the address.

is_drop_ship.description: Whether the address is a drop ship location.

street_line_1.description: First line of the street address.

street_line_2.description: Second line of the street address.

AuditEvent.description: Immutable audit event record. Captures the actor, changed resource, and timestamp.

resource_type.description: Resource type of the audited entity.

changes.description: Field-level changes recorded for this event.

metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON metadata for the mutation (e.g. reason, source, tags).

idempotency_key.description: Idempotency key of the originating request.

created_at.description: When the audit event record was created.

AuditFieldChange.description: Field-level before/after transition recorded during a mutation.

old_value.description: Previous value as a JSON fragment. Null for creation events.

new_value.description: New value as a JSON fragment. Null for deletion events.

Consumption.description: Material consumed by a production step.

instructions.description: Instructions for how this material is consumed.

CreateAPIKeyRequest.description: Request to create an API key.

role_id.description: Role ID assigned to the API key.

name.description: Human-readable name for the API key.

expires_at.description: Expiration time. If not set, the key does not expire.

CreateAccountGroupRequest.description: Request to create an account group.

CreateAccountUserRequest.description: Request to create an account user.

password.description: Password (only valid for scanner-role users backing a scanning station).

preferences.description: Notification preferences to create for the new user (external targets only).

color.description: Color code. Randomly assigned if not provided.

sort_order.description: Display order. Defaults to last position if not provided.

account_number.description: Carrier account number. Required for UPS and USPS carriers.

default_sales_rep_user_id.description: The ID of the account user to assign as the default sales rep.

CreateItemCategoryRequest.description: Request to create an item category.

type.description: Item category type. Material categories are used to group materials, while product categories are used to group products and parts.

parent_id.description: Parent location ID. Null for top-level locations.

child_ids.description: IDs of child locations to attach.

CreatePaymentTermRequest.description: Request to create a payment term.

CreateProductLineRequest.description: Request to create a product line.

CreateRoleRequest.description: CreateRoleRequest is a request to create a role.

mode.description: Controls whether the sandbox is blank or seeded with sample data.

CreateScanningStationRequest.description: Request to create a scanning station.

material_check_required.description: Whether material check is required. If `true`, the operator at this station must manually verify the material before proceeding.

CreateServiceLevelRequest.description: Request to create a service level.

CreateShippingTermRequest.description: Request to create a shipping term.

flat_rate.description: Flat rate for this shipping term.

minimum_order_value.description: Minimum order value for free shipping.

free_shipping_service_level_ids.description: Service level IDs that qualify for free shipping.

CreateUnitGroupRequest.description: CreateUnitGroupRequest is a request to create a unit group.

associated_units.description: Associated units to create with the group.

CreateUnitGroupUnitParam.description: CreateUnitGroupUnitParam contains parameters for an associated unit.

CreateUnitGroupUnitRequest.description: CreateUnitGroupUnitRequest is a request to create an associated unit within a unit group.

ratio_numerator.description: Conversion ratio numerator relative to the base unit, as a decimal string.

ratio_denominator.description: Conversion ratio denominator relative to the base unit, as a decimal string.

offset_numerator.description: Conversion offset numerator, as a decimal string.

offset_denominator.description: Conversion offset denominator, as a decimal string.

CreatedAPIKey.description: Result of creating an API key, with the full secret value.

api_key_secret.description: Full secret value. Returned once and cannot be retrieved later.

is_parent_account.description: Whether this is a parent account.

parent_account.description: Parent account. Present if this is a child account.

child_accounts.description: Child accounts. Present if this is a parent account.

ses_message_id.description: SES message ID returned by AWS.

sent_by.description:
Actor who sent the email. Null when the email was sent by the
system, or when the caller did not request `include=sent_by`.

street_line_1.description: First line of the street address.

street_line_2.description: Second line of the street address.

properties.description: Properties associated with this item category.

unit_group.description: Unit group associated with this item category.

parent.description: Parent location. Null for top-level locations. Expandable.

MergeCustomersRequest.description: Request to merge source customers into a target customer.

NotificationPreferenceItem.description: NotificationPreferenceItem toggles a single account-relation notification type.

notification_type_code.description: Notification type code. Must match a value of constants.AccountRelationNotificationType.

enabled.description: Whether this notification type is enabled for the account user.

Owner.description: Owner describes the provenance of a resource.

type.description: The owner type: "system" for platform defaults, "account" for account-owned resources.

account.description: The account that owns this resource. `null` if the object is system-owned.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to fetch the next page, `null` if no more pages.

prev_cursor.description: Cursor to fetch the previous page, `null` if on the first page.

has_next_page.description: Whether more results exist after this page.

has_prev_page.description: Whether results exist before this page.

Priority.description: Priority level used by sales orders and picks.

ProductionOutput.description: Production output of a production step.

ProductionStep.description: Production step with all nested data.

leveling_factor.description: Leveling factor as a decimal string.

in_steps.description: Input steps feeding into this step.

out_steps.description: Output steps this step feeds into.

ProductionStepDepartment.description: Department reference on a production step.

ProductionStepMachine.description: Machine reference on a production step.

ProductionStepScanStation.description: Scanning station reference on a production step.

display_value.description: Formatted value with unit abbreviation (e.g. "$1,234.56" or "100 kg").

QuantityInput.description: QuantityInput represents a value with an associated unit for create/update requests.

unit_id.description: The unit ID for the value.

QuotaInfo.description:
QuotaInfo provides machine-readable details about a plan-imposed resource limit.
Included in limit_exceeded errors so clients can display upgrade prompts, usage bars,
or implement programmatic retry/backoff logic.

limit.description: Limit is the maximum number of resources allowed by the current plan.

used.description: Used is the number of resources currently consumed.

reset_at.description: ResetAt is the time when the quota resets, if applicable. Nil for static (non-metered) limits.

value.description: Rate value as a decimal string.

display_value.description: Human-readable formatted value (e.g. "$25.50 / kg" or "100 kg / hr").

RequestLog.description: RequestLog is an API request log entry.

created_at.description: When the log entry was created.

ResponseError.description:
ResponseError is the JSON-serializable error body returned to API clients. It contains
only public information. This struct is used by the OpenAPI schema generator to produce
documentation.

code.description: A machine-readable code for the error.

message.description: A human-readable message providing more details about the error.

param.description: The parameter that caused the error, if applicable.

doc_url.description: A URL to documentation about the error.

is_transient.description: Whether this error is transient and the request can be retried.

quota.description: Quota provides plan limit details when the error is limit_exceeded. Nil otherwise.

request_log_url.description:
RequestLogURL is a link to the dashboard page for this request's log entry.
Nil when no request log is available.

RotateAPIKeyRequest.description: Request to rotate an API key.

updated_at.description: When this sandbox was last updated.

ServiceLevel.description: Shipping service level for a carrier.

is_default.description: Default service level for the carrier.

minimum_order_value.description: Minimum order value quantity, if any.

free_shipping_service_levels.description: Service levels that qualify for free shipping.

created_at.description: When this shipping term was created.

updated_at.description: When this shipping term was last updated.

Unit.description: Unit of measurement used for conversions and product quantities.

ratio_numerator.description: Conversion ratio numerator relative to the base unit in the same dimension.

ratio_denominator.description: Conversion ratio denominator relative to the base unit in the same dimension.

offset_numerator.description: Conversion offset numerator, used for temperature-like conversions. Zero for most unit types.

is_base_unit.description: Whether this is the base unit for its dimension. Conversion ratios are relative to this unit.

updated_at.description: When this unit was last updated.

UnitGroup.description: UnitGroup is a unit group resource.

UnitGroupUnit.description: UnitGroupUnit is an associated unit within a unit group.

UpdateAccountGroupRequest.description: Request to partially update an account group.

UpdateAccountUserRequest.description: Request to partially update an account user.

preferences.description: Notification preferences to toggle (external targets only).

UpdateAccountUserStatusRequest.description: Request to transition an account user to a target status.

UpdateAddressRequest.description: Request to partially update an address.

phone.description: Phone number associated with the address.

email.description: Email address associated with the address.

is_drop_ship.description: Whether the address is a drop ship location.

street_line_1.description: First line of the street address.

street_line_2.description: Second line of the street address.

UpdateCustomerRequest.description: Request to partially update a customer.

email.description: Email address. Send null to clear.

phone.description: Phone number. Send null to clear.

url.description: Website URL. Send null to clear.

default_sales_rep_user_id.description: The ID of the account user to assign as the default sales rep.

customer_price_group_ids.description: Price group IDs. Replaces all existing price groups when provided.

credit_limit.description: Credit limit. Send null to clear.

UpdateItemCategoryRequest.description: Request to partially update an item category.

UpdateLocationRequest.description: Request to partially update a location.

parent_id.description: Parent location ID. Send null to clear.

child_ids.description: Child location IDs. Replaces all current children when provided. Send null to clear.

UpdatePaymentTermRequest.description: Request to partially update a payment term.

UpdateProductLineRequest.description: Request to partially update a product line.

UpdateRoleRequest.description: UpdateRoleRequest is a request to update a role.

permissions.description: Permissions in `<domain>:<action>` format. Replaces all existing permissions; omit to leave unchanged.

UpdateScanningStationRequest.description: Request to partially update a scanning station.

material_check_required.description: Whether material check is required. If `true`, the operator at this station must manually verify the material before proceeding.

UpdateServiceLevelRequest.description: Request to update a service level.

is_default.description: Whether this is the tenant's preferred default service level for the carrier.

UpdateShippingTermRequest.description:
Request to partially update a shipping term.
All fields are optional. Absent fields are left unchanged. Send an explicit
JSON null for flat_rate, minimum_order_value, or free_shipping_service_level_ids
to clear the existing value.

flat_rate.description: Flat rate. Send null to clear.

minimum_order_value.description: Minimum order value for free shipping. Send null to clear.

free_shipping_service_level_ids.description: Service level IDs that qualify for free shipping. Send null to clear.

UpdateUnitGroupRequest.description: UpdateUnitGroupRequest is a request to partially update a unit group.

notes.description: Notes. Set to null to clear.

associated_units.description: Upserts associated units when provided. Existing units not in the list are preserved.

UpdateUnitGroupUnitRequest.description: UpdateUnitGroupUnitRequest is a request to update an associated unit.

UpdateUnitRequest.description: Request to partially update a unit.

ratio_numerator.description: Conversion ratio numerator, as a decimal string.

ratio_denominator.description: Conversion ratio denominator, as a decimal string.

offset_numerator.description: Conversion offset numerator, as a decimal string.

offset_denominator.description: Conversion offset denominator, as a decimal string.

email_verified_at.description: Email verified timestamp, null if unverified.

address_line_1.description: First line of the street address.

address_line_2.description: Second line of the street address.

formatted_address.description: Formatted address from the validation service.
